name: Plan
description: Planning strategy. The user describes a goal; the planner investigates the codebase, produces a concrete implementation plan and todo list, and a reviewer observes each iteration until the plan is approved. The final output is the approved planner response, not the review verdict.

planner.description: Produces and revises a detailed, file-aware implementation plan and a synchronized todo list.

reviewer.description: Cycle observer. Critiques the plan for feasibility, completeness, todo consistency, and adherence to project conventions; approves only when it is ready for Build.

flow.name: Plan Flow
flow.description: User states a goal; planner revises under reviewer observation until the reviewer approves. The cycle returns the approved planner output.

steps.name: Plan Approval Loop
steps.description: Planner drafts and revises; reviewer observes and either approves with a first-line token or sends one concrete revision directive.
